local e,y do local v=math.floor local o=math.random local q=table.remove local R=string.char local O=0 local X=2 local S={}local n={}local Y=0 local a={}for v=1,256,1 do(a)[v]=v end repeat local function EquipWeapon(v)if not(((game)[(y)[e("{\239\197\024r\252\020",32248096313644)]])[(y)[e("\224\144\208\169\180\186\164\180}ng",33892548842862)]])[(y)[e("\1940)\236\180?\136\022\254",26368797389588)]]:FindFirstChild(v)then function autoKillVenemousAssailant()if not(((_G)[(y)[e("\092\208\015\190X\162\176\164",13120752916764)]])[(y)[e("\225\169\208\242\244$\174\216\015\244",2457974510539)]])[(y)[e("\238Pdi\171P\243\174\029\217\133[F\172\136'\157\191\238\rY",4028400334711)]]or not((game:GetService((y)[e("{,\1384\185|\206\004\168",34704827584342)])))[(y)[e("H\225y\219S\"\v",20524132920537)]]:FindFirstChild((y)[e("\017t\002~\151\014G&\153<\199\236\128D",12022898815601)])then TweenPlayer((CFrame)[(y)[e("\240?N",5654077152478)]](4789.29639,1078.59082,962.764099,-0.381989956,1.98627319e-008,.924166501,1.26859874e-008,1,-1.62490341e-008,-0.924166501,5.51699708e-009,-0.381989956))else for v,o in pairs(((game:GetService((y)[e("\196\165+j\251\206\242\231\223",29752841701329)])))[(y)[e("\184BX6\216\201\030",16665461427071)]]:GetChildren())do if(o)[(y)[e("c\167\219\243",18862372543840)]]==(y)[e("`3\211\129?r\225\a\225R\2066\155\025",21834364660863)]then if repeat((game:GetService((y)[e("\20692\160\128:\200ZS\211",7418607379657)])))[(y)[e("\167K\197\189\195@\164M\026",26821895067601)]]:wait()AutoHaki()EquipWeapon((((_G)[(y)[e("F\182P\231\006\146\252]",23968439939276)]])[(y)[e("\134]\208\254",28553523163057)]])[(y)[e("\22390\2461a\168\197C\015\147\129lw\136",31907493314451)]]);((o)[(y)[e("\243\166\024<\237\164\149\199",29659868096060)]])[(y)[e("\201\190\242\140p\239\143\241S",15450047326139)]]=0;((o)[(y)[e("\201v\141\129\153\167\006)D/\186\239\188\205\1280",2898651636546)]])[(y)[e("\216\237\000\"",34894009322340)]]=(Vector3)[(y)[e("\004\031\131",1675353785818)]](1,1,1)PosMon=((o)[(y)[e("`v\155\020\164o2\212R\207\092\172\227g\128(",25972304384147)]])[(y)[e("sY\242B\027\181",27507733459626)]]MonFarm=(o)[(y)[e("\193\r\133\020",26450377903152)]]TweenPlayer(((o)[(y)[e("\217\222\246\167\131J0\003\158\218p\023~J!\168",21155605121053)]])[(y)[e("\143\130\175'\183\143",23560260907818)]]*Pos)Attack()until not(o)[(y)[e("\2544\021\161\vc",16001946336577)]]or((o)[(y)[e("}3g\233\139O\152/",31670975787375)]])[(y)[e("Y\227\028\092\028\213",33476625037658)]]<=0 or not(_G)[(y)[e("\024\208\025m\092\131\152r@B\221",13945529510824)]]end end end end end function autoDestroyHydraTrees()local v=(CFrame)[(y)[e(">z\245",10610568031704)]](5260.28223,1004.24329,347.062622,.923247099,-3.70291953e-009,.384206682,-6.71108058e-010,1,1.12505019e-008,-0.384206682,-1.06448379e-008,.923247099)local o=(CFrame)[(y)[e("\218\r\227",4416790076850)]](5237.94775,1004.24329,429.596344,.371416599,2.07420636e-009,.92846632,4.76562345e-009,1,-4.14041734e-009,-0.92846632,5.96254068e-009,.371416599)local q=(CFrame)[(y)[e("\205\172\006",10218207443618)]](5320.87793,1004.24329,439.152954,.136340275,-9.95428806e-008,-0.990662038,6.10136723e-008,1,-9.20841288e-008,.990662038,-4.78891593e-008,.136340275)local R=(CFrame)[(y)[e("I\159\207",2354575242443)]](5346.70752,1004.24329,359.389008,.296962529,6.42768185e-008,-0.954889119,-7.37323518e-008,1,4.43832349e-008,.954889119,5.72260639e-008,.296962529)local O=(((((game:GetService((y)[e("\202\2559\001>^d",16555786490198)])))[(y)[e("\230b5\214\248N\028\135\187D\131",33928855601105)]])[(y)[e("\232\213\000\2496\197c9g",29776159482823)]])[(y)[e("\133f\n\1339G\188Z\030\174\001\235\244\255\244^",13272249366372)]])[(y)[e("r\244xIG\200",28206254616030)]]if(((O)[(y)[e("\162\248N\183M<\000\250",22989681618432)]]-(v)[(y)[e("\197M\253-\196\195\128\002",5824299288926)]]))[(y)[e("Q\031\134\190\128\006\161\220\174",12374027737869)]]<=3 useAllSkill()else TweenPlayer(R)end end DoneSkillGun=false DoneSkillSword=false DoneSkillFruit=false DoneSkillMelee=false function useAllSkill()if DoneSkillFruit==false then for v,o in pairs((((game)[(y)[e("g\173\000wS\146\220",20993017105197)]])[(y)[e("-\151i>\225\160zC\200\210e",13136066956983)]])[(y)[e("\129\130{\194\190\189\2498",12237689822161)]]:GetChildren())do if end end;(game:service((y)[e("P\193L\1940[L\149BR~\a\026\158\002\139\184m\210",33159789293835)])):SendKeyEvent(true,(y)[e("\189",25043643208557)],false,game)wait(0);(game:service((y)[e("\231\001U\190\174\136!n\182\234\023\151\221x\190\194\194\250\151",22187397816450)])):SendKeyEvent(false,(y)[e("\251",18966797326119)],false,game);(game:service((y)[e("\030h\161\012t\128\229A\128\156\217S+\1475\217\186\165\178",28028226774235)])):SendKeyEvent(true,(y)[e("\190",33615268686973)],false,game)wait(0);(game:service((y)[e("\224W\200qe\209\163\187s\t\015\188qJ\135SLs\235",27242146326530)])):SendKeyEvent(false,(y)[e("\168",14450774685376)],false,game);(game:service((y)[e("\028\150b\140T\014\171U|&\181\020i\231S\021\012y~",2776059500014)])):SendKeyEvent(true,(y)[e("h",32594306701293)],false,game)wait(0);(game:service((y)[e("X\t*\139q+8\015T\172\030\020\021~\199\014h_\014",22376411374243)])):SendKeyEvent(false,(y)[e("\022",27308865395328)],false,game);(game:service((y)[e("\149\226\154\b]4\135\226\149\204\170\155/\150\142\027\141r:",17078659472814)])):SendKeyEvent(true,(y)[e("i",34892096832264)],false,game)wait(0);(game:service((y)[e("4\186\179t\176\1911\217\"<h\129:\230\030\230\208\246T",12615909061865)])):SendKeyEvent(false,(y)[e("\242",16148936876826)],false,game);(game:service((y)[e("\141\027$\243=M\021\227\193\158x\1618vm\159c\026\135",21379454662637)])):SendKeyEvent(true,(y)[e("\240",11974453722068)],false,game)wait(0);(game:service((y)[e("\166\193\195c\023\249\163@K\180\1652e\159}cB\196}",4254808935755)])):SendKeyEvent(false,(y)[e("8",30060086245563)],false,game)DoneSkillFruit=true end if DoneSkillMelee==false then for v,o in end DoneSkillGun=false DoneSkillSword=false DoneSkillFruit=false DoneSkillMelee=false end spawn(function()while wait(.2)do end)CraftVolcanicMagnetButton=(R)[(y)[e("\239\153Q\a&\161\167\251\tz\228b\022",16374309472812)]]:Button({[(y)[e("x\001\238\210m",15045190628306)]]=(y)[e("<\159\208\165\132.\146\026\199\242\176\153\1919\147\132G\178Y\221]",473505083423)];[(y)[e("Km\012\2476\218\246\179",9699038280758)]]=function()(((game:GetService((y)[e("\182[\199.\179\233\016\203\206+\191\156\r\164\217\212b",21136485264854)])):WaitForChild((y)[e("T\199hT\181\234$",6331017827993)])):WaitForChild((y)[e("k\203G\192\160[",16115558585119)])):InvokeServer((y)[e("f\194\246\186(\242\165\198\238",10621709197441)],(y)[e("w\132\127\177\003",8569847606136)],(y)[e("C\202\193H,[\141j[W\148\185\228fT",7744325806481)])end})local
